title: Engine snapshot
description: Wraps XState v5 actor.getPersistedSnapshot() with engine identity / metadata. Bookkeeping artifact for fast resume; not canonical. If missing or invalid, the engine rebuilds the machine from canonical state (note-frontmatter + judgements + git).

machine_hash.description: Hash of the compiled flat-flow used to construct the machine. Engine refuses to restore if the hash differs from the current compiled flow (= flow definition changed under us).

xstate_snapshot.description: Opaque payload from XState v5 actor.getPersistedSnapshot(). Engine does not interpret structure — passes through to createActor(machine, { snapshot }).
